CTE Companion App · Digital Media & Animation

Get your students certification-ready

The classroom companion that gets your CTE students ready to pass the Arizona Digital Animation Technical Skills Assessment — and shows you exactly who's ready.

👋 This is a live sample of the student app — go ahead and tap through it. Want it for your classroom, or a custom one built for your subject? Scroll to “Work with us” at the bottom and we'll show you how it works for your school.
REAL TUTORIAL CLIPSplays offline

Actual video tutorials from the program

Every lesson comes with a real studio walkthrough video — here are three straight from the course:

🎬 Bouncing Ball
The very first exercise — timing, spacing & squash/stretch.
🎬 Sack Catches a Water Balloon
Weight & anticipation with a flour-sack character.
🎬 Dog Walk Cycle
Building a believable four-legged walk, drawing by drawing.
STEP 1 · LEARN

Learn it first

Short, plain-English micro-lessons on each standard — the exact stuff the test checks. ~60 seconds each. (In the full app, every lesson plays one of the studio's real animation clips — the part no textbook can do.)

🎬 animation clip plays here in the full app
✓

Lessons done — now let's see what stuck.

STEP 2 · TESTreadiness check

Try the readiness check

Questions built straight from the Arizona Digital Animation standards (10.0304.00). Answer a few — get an instant readiness score and see exactly which standards a student still needs to study.

0%

By standard — where they stand

AI TUTORcoming soon

AI Tutor — coming soon

A built-in tutor that explains any animation question in plain language, on demand — like a teacher who never gets tired of the question. Rolling out with the full version.

Get early access

CTE Companion Apps are coming. Animation is first. More pathways will follow. Join the early-access list and we'll bring it to your classroom.

And it isn't just CTE — we build custom study & practice apps for any class a teacher runs: math, biology, history, whatever you teach.

✓

TEACHER VIEWwhat YOU see

The teacher's dashboard

Same app, the teacher's side. Every student is self-paced — you see who's moving and who's stuck, no chasing. A simple test allows 2 days, a complex one 4; past that they turn red and get a nudge (so do you).
